cleavage agent: added 0.5 μg of trypsin (Promega) to the diluted urea
collision energy: All cross-linked samples were measured with the following charge exclusion: unassigned,1,2,3,8,>8.
instrument: inject the dissolved proteins directly via a HESI-II ion source into a Q Exactive Plus (Thermo Fisher Scientific) mass spectrometer
ionization type: inject the dissolved proteins directly via a HESI-II ion source
labeling: the samples were analyzed by a 120 minute 0-40% acetonitrile gradient on a liquid chromatography system coupled to a Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
reduction reagent: 2 mM DTT (Sigma) for 1 hour at room temperature
reduction concentration: 2 mM DTT (Sigma) for 1 hour at room temperature
